name: Cccs Of The Savannah Area, Inc.
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling agency in Savannah offering debt management plans, credit counseling, and housing assistance to help families restore financial health.
description_long:
CCCS of Savannah is a locally-based non-profit credit counseling organization that has operated for over 60 years in the Savannah, Georgia area. The organization positions itself as the only locally-based non-profit credit counseling agency in the region, emphasizing community roots and long-term commitment to the area.

The organization offers comprehensive financial counseling services including debt management programs, credit and budget counseling, housing counseling with certified counselors, first-time home buyer programs, reverse mortgage education, and foreclosure avoidance assistance. They provide a "My Virtual Counselor" tool that allows clients to estimate savings on debt management plans before meeting with a counselor in person. All initial consultations are offered free of charge through online appointments or phone contact.

CCCS of Savannah distinguishes itself through its non-profit status, emphasis on being judgment-free, employment of certified housing counselors, and a stated focus on community-related programs. The organization highlights successful client outcomes across multiple testimonials, with clients reporting credit card debt elimination, renegotiated rates and payments, and positive counseling experiences. The website emphasizes professional service and courteous customer support.

As a non-profit credit counseling agency, CCCS of Savannah is appropriate for consumers seeking legitimate debt management and financial education rather than debt settlement or credit repair. However, potential clients should understand that debt management plans may affect credit scores during repayment, and the organization's service area appears focused on the Savannah region specifically. Success depends on client commitment to the program and ability to meet agreed-upon payment terms.
pros: Non-profit organization with 60+ years operating history in the Savannah community
Free initial credit and budget counseling consultations available online or by phone
Certified housing counselors on staff for foreclosure prevention and first-time homebuyer programs
Debt management programs include negotiated reduced rates and payments with creditors
No-judgment approach to financial counseling explicitly stated in marketing
My Virtual Counselor tool allows clients to estimate savings before committing to program
Multiple positive client testimonials reporting successful debt elimination and improved financial health
cons: Service area appears limited to Savannah region despite national non-profit ecosystem
Debt management plans typically require 3-5 years to complete, as evidenced by client testimonials
Limited information provided on website about how debt management plans affect credit scores during repayment
No pricing or fee structure clearly stated on the website for debt management services
Website does not specify which creditor types participate or whether all creditors will negotiate
best_for: Savannah-area residents with multiple credit cards maxed out seeking structured repayment plans
Homeowners concerned about foreclosure or seeking reverse mortgage education
First-time home buyers in Georgia needing counseling and program connections
Individuals seeking judgment-free credit counseling and budget planning assistance
diagnosis: CCCS of Savannah is best suited for Savannah-area residents with credit card debt who need structured, negotiated repayment plans and want working with a non-profit, judgment-free organization. Primary caveat: debt management plans require multi-year commitment and may temporarily impact credit scores, making this appropriate only for clients unable to pay debt quickly but committed to systematic repayment.
services: Debt Management Programs with creditor negotiation
Reverse mortgage education and equity leverage consultation
My Virtual Counselor debt savings estimation tool
Creditor call cessation support as part of debt management
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
